categories.label: Official company
categories.description: Primary company or product website used for official announcements.

categories.label: Official blog
categories.description: Official engineering, product, research, or news blog.

categories.label: Research lab
categories.description: Academic, nonprofit, or corporate AI research lab publication channel.

categories.label: arXiv
categories.description: Public preprint source. Requires paper review and independent interpretation.

categories.label: GitHub
categories.description: Public code repository, release, or issue source.

categories.label: Hugging Face
categories.description: Public model, dataset, space, paper, or organization source.

categories.label: AI media
categories.description: AI-focused media outlet with named authors and source links.

categories.label: Newsletter
categories.description: Curated public email or web newsletter.

categories.label: X account
categories.description: Public X account. Weight depends heavily on identity and evidence.

categories.label: Researcher
categories.description: Public expert account or page from a known researcher.

categories.label: Product builder
categories.description: Public account or blog from a builder with hands-on product signal.

categories.label: Journalist
categories.description: Named journalist with relevant beat coverage.

categories.label: Rumor or leak
categories.description: Unverified or leak-oriented source. Keep low weight and clearly labeled.

categories.label: Manual import
categories.description: User-imported public item requiring explicit attribution.
